extracted_items.content: Project name: taskflow-api — a REST API backend for a task management app
Technology stack: FastAPI (web framework), PostgreSQL (database), SQLAlchemy (ORM), Pydantic v2 (data validation), Alembic (migrations)
User preference: use uv for package management instead of pip or poetry — prefers it for speed
Project structure: app/ (with main.py, models/, schemas/, routers/, services/, db.py), alembic/, tests/, pyproject.toml. Business logic should be in services layer, not route handlers
Testing requirements: pytest with pytest-asyncio and httpx for testing FastAPI endpoints. Minimum 80% test coverage required
Deployment: Docker (multi-stage Dockerfile with uv for deps, slim runtime image) and Fly.io
CI/CD: GitHub Actions pipeline that runs ruff linting, pytest with coverage check, and builds Docker image on main branch
[architecture] Use Pydantic v2 for the benefits of performance improvements, accepting the breaking changes from v1 (e.g., @validator → @field_validator)
